import React from 'react'
import Layout from '../../layout'
import HeroHeader from '../../homepage/hero-header'
import ProductListing from '../../homepage/product-listing'
import Benefits from '../../homepage/benefits'

const Homepage = () => {
  return (
    <Layout>
      <HeroHeader />
      <ProductListing />
      <Benefits />

    </Layout>
  )
}

export default Homepage
